ValidationRule.description: After a case closure or reopening, user cannot change key information on the case detail page.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND(NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c),CONTAINS($Label.CCCMRetrieveRecordTypeIds, RecordType.DeveloperName), OR( AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), 'Closed'), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), 'Reopened'), NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Reopening_Reason__c)))), OR( OR( /*AND(NOT(ISBLANK(AccountId)), ISCHANGED(AccountId) ), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(ContactId)), ISCHANGED(ContactId) ), */ AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Contract__c)), ISCHANGED(Contract__c) ), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Type))), ISCHANGED(Type) ), /*AND(NOT(ISBLANK(Description)), ISCHANGED(Description) ),*/ AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(External_Case_Detail__c))), ISCHANGED(External_Case_Detail__c) ), AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(External_Case_Category__c))), ISCHANGED(External_Case_Category__c) )),
AND( OR( AND(NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT(Status))), ISCHANGED(Status),NOT(ISPICKVAL(Reopening_Reason__c, 'Case Not Solved')))), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status, 'New'), AND(ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), 'Closed'),ISPICKVAL(Status, 'In progress')), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Pending - Internal'), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Pending - Customer'), ISPICKVAL(Status, 'Pending - External')) ) ) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status), 'Closed'), NOT(ISPICKVAL((Status), 'Reopened')), NOT(ISPICKVAL((Status), 'Deleted')), ISCHANGED(Status)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Impossible to change Case Status, Type, Category or Details if the case is already closed or reopened.
